exampleSentences: Chúng ta luôn mong muốn một tương lai tốt đẹp cho con cái.
Anh hy vọng mọi điều tốt đẹp sẽ đến với em trong năm mới.
Giữa bạn bè, sự tin tưởng tạo ra mối quan hệ tốt đẹp.
notes:
tốt đẹp means good and beautiful in a positive, wholesome way. It’s used for things that are morally good, emotionally nice, or have a bright quality.

It’s an adjective and usually comes after the noun it describes.  

Often used for abstract things like tương lai (future), kỷ niệm (memories), tình cảm (feelings), ước mơ (dreams). It feels warmer and more emotional than just tốt.

Close to tốt (good) and đẹp (beautiful), but stronger when you want both goodness and beauty together. Opposite idea: xấu (bad/ugly).

example.vi: Cuộc sống của tôi rất tốt đẹp.

exampleSentencesTranslated: We always wish for a good and beautiful future for our children.
I hope all good and beautiful things will come to you in the new year.
Among friends, trust creates a good and beautiful relationship.
notes_md:
**tốt đẹp** means *good and beautiful* in a positive, wholesome way. It’s used for things that are morally good, emotionally nice, or have a bright quality.

It’s an adjective and usually comes **after the noun** it describes.  

Often used for abstract things like tương lai (future), kỷ niệm (memories), tình cảm (feelings), ước mơ (dreams). It feels warmer and more emotional than just **tốt**.

Close to **tốt** (good) and **đẹp** (beautiful), but stronger when you want both goodness and beauty together. Opposite idea: **xấu** (bad/ugly).
